data.user_prompt: Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisville?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response perplexity Who offers in-home therapy or community-based mental health support in Louisvill

sections.text:
In Louisville, **April ABA Therapy**, **LifeStance Health**, **Haven Family Counseling (Boys & Girls Haven)**, and **OMNI Louisville** offer in-home therapy or community-based mental health support for individuals and families.

### Key Providers of In-Home & Community-Based Mental Health Support

| Provider | Services Offered | Target Population | Notes |
|----------|------------------|-------------------|-------|
| **April ABA Therapy** [1] | In-home ABA therapy (Autism-focused behavior treatment) | Children with autism, whole family | Family-focused, evidence-based, at-home care |
| **LifeStance Health** [2] | In-person and telehealth therapy (CBT, DBT, etc.) | Adults, children, adolescents, couples, families | 35+ therapists, 9 local offices, accepts in-network insurance |
| **Haven Family Counseling (Boys & Girls Haven)** [3] | Intensive in-home therapy + case management; outpatient & telehealth | Children, adolescents, adults, families | Nonprofit, 70+ years serving KY, affordable & flexible |
| **OMNI Louisville** [5] | Community-based mental health (in homes, parks, community centers); FITT & Family Preservation Services | Foster families, families at risk of out-of-home placement | Hands-on therapist + case manager model; serves in-home |
| **StepStone Family & Youth Services** [8] | Intensive In-Home Program (ages 5–18) | Youth in community-based family systems | Medicaid-reimbursed, least-restrictive setting |

### Additional Notes
- **Baptist Health** [4] and **Holsman PT** [7] offer *in-home physical/occupational therapy*, not mental health support.
- **Mandala House** [6] provides outpatient and telehealth therapy but does not explicitly offer in-home or community-based services.
- Most in-home mental health services require a **physician referral** or are **Medicaid-reimbursed**.

For immediate access, contact **April ABA** for autism-specific care, **Haven Family Counseling** for family-based crisis support, or **OMNI Louisville** for foster and high-risk family services. All offer flexible scheduling and telehealth options.
